Ipopt compiled to WebAssembly

Static libraries for linking Ipopt+MUMPS in WebAssembly (wasm32, compiled with -fPIC):

  • libipopt.a - Ipopt 3.14.20
  • libmumps.a - MUMPS 5.8.1 sparse solver
  • liblapack.a - Reference BLAS/LAPACK
  • libflangrt.a - Fortran runtime (flang-rt)
  • wasm32_bridges.c - Bridge functions (must compile and link)

Browser demo

Run Ipopt in your browser (solves HS071 with both wasm32 and wasm64)

npm package

npm install ipopt-wasm

wasm32: import { solve } from "ipopt-wasm"

wasm64: import { solve } from "ipopt-wasm/index64.mjs"

Built with: flang 22.1.1 + Emscripten 5.0.2

Source: github.com/louisabraham/ipopt-wasm
